subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1913-02-17
subcodes.first_line: I have certain things that attract the confirmations of God. They are so wonderful and extraordinary that if I tell them, some people may not accept them as facts.
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Shrines and Holy places, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rejection, opposition and persecution, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
